en.factMarkers: \b(my(?:\s+\w+(?:'s)?){0,3}\s+name is|i(?:\s+\w+){0,4}\s+live(?:\s+\w+){0,2}\s+in|i(?:\s+\w+){0,4}\s+work(?:\s+\w+){0,4}\s+(at|as|for)|i am(?:\s+\w+){0,4}\s+a\b|i'm(?:\s+\w+){0,4}\s+a\b|i prefer|remember that|note that|for future reference|call me|i go by|i have (?:a|an|\d+)(?:\s+\w+){0,4}\s+named)\b
en.healthOrDietaryMarkers: \b(i'?m|i am)\b(?:\s+\w+){0,4}\s+(allergic to|diabetic|vegetarian|vegan|lactose intolerant|gluten[\s-]free|celiac)\b|\bi('?ve| have)\b(?:\s+\w+){0,4}\s+(an? .{0,20})?allerg\w*\b|\b(i don'?t eat|i can'?t eat|i cannot eat)\b
